titleStmt.title: SII 11.144: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 144. (B.K. No. 65 of 1927-28). DAMBAḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON THE WALL TO THE LEFT OF ENTRANCE INTO THE JAINA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and records the gift of oil made by the Fifty Families of oilmen (Telligar), for a perpetual lamp in the Bauddha-vihāra built by Saṅgava-Seṭṭi.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 23, Bahudhānya, Āshāḍha, ba. ēkādaśī, Sunday, saṅkramaṇa. The corresponding English date is A.D. 1098, June 27, Sunday, but the Karkaṭaka, i.e., Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkramaṇa occurred on the previous day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēsva(ra)raṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakulatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . © vineyaviḷāsareṁdu budhe
bāndhavare(ṁ)ndu guṇāḍhyareṁdu sajjananutareṁdu sākṣarikare(ṁ)ndu dayāparare(ṁ)ndu
bhāratīstanamaṇihārare(ṁ)ndu sujanāśrayareṁdu taguḷde baṇnikuṁ vananidhivē
ṣṭitākiḷamahīvaḷeyaṁ paḍedayvadiṁbaraṁ . © paramaparōpakāriga ḷudāriga
ḷāśritakaḷpavrikṣa rādarita(ta)samastaba(ṁ)ndhujana rugravirōdhimadāpaha rmmahōddhuradura dīra
rārjjitayasōdhana rārjjitapuṁṇyare(ṁ)ndu pūṇdirade taguḷde baṇnipu diḷāvaḷa yaṁ paḍedayva
diṁbara . © parahitacarita rudāra rpparanārīdūra ramaḷaguṇagaṇaniḷaya rvvaradharmma
tatpara rbhāsuratējōnidhiga ḷayvadiṁba rjjagadoḷ . © jaḷanidhiya gu(ṁ)ṇpa navanī taḷadoḷoppu
va biṇpa(ṁ) namaraśaiḷada peṇpaṁ taḷedayvadiṁbarēṁ kēvaḷame bhuvanaprākāsakīrttiviḷāsar ©
saraṇendu ba(ṁ)ndu maṟevuge bharavasadiṁ kāva rartti garttamanīva rvvaraguṇasaṁpannarenal dharaṇi
yoḷintayvadiṁbaruṁ sale negaḻdar . © Antanisi negaḷda telligarayvattokkalu miḻdu śrīma
ccāḷukyavikramakālada 23 ṟeneya bahudhānya saṁvatsarada Āsāḍa bahuḷa Ēkādasi yā
divāra saṁkramāṇadaṁdu śrīmat saṁgavaseṭṭiyar māḍisida bauddhavihārakke naṁdādīvige
ge soḷasiya pramāṇada soṁṭigeya gāṇadaloṁdu soṁṭige yeṇneya nācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantu
māḍi koṭṭar . © I dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge bāṇarāsi gurukṣētra prayāge Argghyatīrtta
dalu sāsira kapileyaṁ kōḍuṁkoḷaguma soparṇnadalu kaṭṭisi sahasracaturvvēdapāragarappa
brahmargge suryyagrahaṇadalu dānaṁgoṭṭa paḷamaku . © Idanaḷidāta vāraṇāsi prayā ge A
rgghetīrtadalu sāsira kapileyumaṁ sāsirvva brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsira tapōdhanaruma(ṁ) naḷida paṁcama
hāpātakanaku . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasundharāṁṣaṣṭiruvariṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
